center.name: Granite Belt
center.summary: Granite Belt是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Chestnut-rumped heathwren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut-rumped heathwren occurs in southeastern Australia from the Granite Belt of southeast Queensland through eastern New South Wales, Victoria, and southeast South Australia.Morcombe, Michael (2012) Field Guide to Australian Birds

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The chestnut-rumped heathwren occurs in southeastern Australia from the Granite Belt of southeast Queensland through eastern New South Wales, Victoria, and southeast South Australia.Morcombe, Michael (2012) Field Guide to Australian Birds
